verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
verses.text: Qāf. By the glorious Qur’ān!

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
verses.text: – No! They are amazed that a warner has come to them from among them, and the disbelievers say, ‘This is an amazing thing!

verses.quran_arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌۭ
verses.text: When we are dead, and turned to dust [. . .]? That is a far return!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
verses.text: We know what the earth takes away from them, and with Us is a Book (that is) keeping watch.

verses.quran_arabic: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍۢ مَّرِيجٍ
verses.text: No! They called the truth a lie when it came to them, and they are in a confused state.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍۢ
verses.text: Do they not look at the sky above them, how We have built it, and adorned it, and it has no cracks?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍۢ
verses.text: And the earth – We stretched it out, and cast on it firm mountains, and caused every beautiful kind (of plant) to grow on it,

verses.quran_arabic: تَبْصِرَةًۭ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍۢ مُّنِيبٍۢ
verses.text: as evidence and a reminder to every servant who turns (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ مُّبَٰرَكًۭا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
verses.text: And We sent down blessed water from the sky, and caused gardens to grow by means of it, and grain for harvest,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَٰتٍۢ لَّهَا طَلْعٌۭ نَّضِيدٌۭ
verses.text: and tall date palms with bunches (of fruit),

verses.quran_arabic: رِّزْقًۭا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةًۭ مَّيْتًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
verses.text: as a provision for the servants, and We give a barren land life by means of it. In this way the coming forth (will take place).

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
verses.text: Before them the people of Noah called (it) a lie, and the people of al-Rass, and Thamūd,

verses.quran_arabic: وَعَادٌۭ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍۢ
verses.text: and ‘Ād, and Pharaoh, and the brothers of Lot,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍۢ ۚ كُلٌّۭ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: and the people of the Grove, and the people of Tubba‘ – each (of them) called the messengers liars, and My promise was proved true.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍۢ مِّنْ خَلْقٍۢ جَدِيدٍۢ
verses.text: Were We tired out by the first creation? No! They are in doubt about a new creation.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
verses.text: Certainly We created the human, and We know what his own self whispers within him, (for) We are closer to him than (his) jugular vein.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌۭ
verses.text: When the two meeters meet together, (one) seated on the right, and (one) on the left,

verses.quran_arabic: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌۭ
verses.text: he does not utter a word without (there being) a watcher ready beside him.

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
verses.text: The daze of death comes in truth: ‘That is what you were trying to avoid!’

verses.quran_arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.text: There will be a blast on the trumpet: ‘That is the Day of Promise.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌۭ وَشَهِيدٌۭ
verses.text: Each person will come, (and) with him a driver and a witness.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ
verses.text: ‘Certainly you were oblivious of this, so We have removed your covering, and today your sight is sharp.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
verses.text: His comrade will say, ‘This is what I have ready.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍۢ
verses.text: ‘(You two), cast into Gehenna every stubborn disbeliever,

verses.quran_arabic: مَّنَّاعٍۢ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍۢ مُّرِيبٍ
verses.text: preventer of the good, transgressor, doubter,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
verses.text: who set up another god with God. Cast him into the harsh punishment.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍۢ
verses.text: His (other) comrade will say, ‘Our Lord, I did not make him transgress insolently, but he was far astray.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.text: He will say, ‘Do not dispute in My presence, when I have already sent forth the promise to you.

verses.quran_arabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمٍۢ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
verses.text: The word is not going to change with Me. I am not an evildoer to (My) servants.’

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍۢ
verses.text: On the Day when We say to Gehenna, ‘Are you filled?,’ and it says, ‘Are there any more (to come)?,’

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمَ يَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدٖ
canonical_variants.english: On the day when He says to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمۡتَلَأۡتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلۡ مِن مَّزِيدٖ
canonical_variants.english: On the day when We say to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ اِ۪مْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: On the day when He says to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ اِ۪مْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: On the day when He says to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.text: and the Garden is brought near for the ones who guard (themselves) – (it is) not far:

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍۢ
verses.text: ‘This is what you were promised. (It is) for everyone who turns (in repentance and) keeps watch

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا مَا يُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
canonical_variants.english: This is what they are promised—for every constant preserver who often turns to God,

canonical_variants.arabic: هَٰذَا مَا يُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٖ
canonical_variants.english: This is what they are promised—for every constant preserver who often turns to God,

verses.quran_arabic: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍۢ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.text: – whoever fears the Merciful in the unseen, and brings a heart turning (in repentance).

verses.quran_arabic: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍۢ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
verses.text: Enter it in peace!’ That is the Day of Eternity.

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌۭ
verses.text: There they will have whatever they please, and with Us (there is still) more.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًۭا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.text: How many a generation We have destroyed before them! They were stronger than them in power, and they searched about in the lands – was there any place of escape?

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ
verses.text: Surely in that is a reminder indeed to whoever has a heart or listens attentively, and he is a witness.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍۢ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We created the heavens and the earth, and whatever is between them, in six days. No weariness touched Us in (doing) that.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
verses.text: Be patient with what they say, and glorify your Lord with praise before the rising of the sun, and before its setting.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.text: And glorify Him during part of the night, and at the ends of the prostration.

canonical_variants.english: And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.
And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.
And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.
And highly exaltsg Him with praise in the night and at the ends of prostrations.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍۢ قَرِيبٍۢ
verses.text: And listen for the Day when the caller will call from a place nearby.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
verses.text: The Day when they hear the cry in truth – that is the Day of Coming Forth.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Surely We – We give life and cause death, and to Us is the (final) destination.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌۭ
verses.text: On the Day when the earth is split open from them, (and they come forth from the graves) rushing – that is an easy gathering for Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمُۥ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمَ تَشَّقَّقُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ عَنۡهُمُۥ سِرَاعٗاۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشۡرٌ عَلَيۡنَا يَسِيرٞ
canonical_variants.english: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوْمَ تَشَّقَّقُ اُ۬لْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعاٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوْمَ تَشَّقَّقُ اُ۬لَارْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعاٗۖ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: The day the earth vigorously ruptures open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.

verses.quran_arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍۢ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: We know what they say. You are not a tyrant over them. So remind, by means of the Qur’ān, anyone who fears My promise.
